We Can Help

Conditions We Treat

Our expert physiotherapists diagnose and treat a wide range of musculoskeletal, neurological and sports-related conditions.

All Conditions

Tap any condition to jump to detailed info, symptoms, causes and our treatment approach.

🦴

Back Pain

🔄

Neck Pain

⚡

Sciatica

🤲

Frozen Shoulder

Paralysis Rehab

Muscle Strain

🦴
Acute & chronic back conditions

Back Pain

Common Symptoms

  • Dull or sharp lower back ache
  • Pain worse with sitting
  • Morning stiffness
  • Radiating to buttocks

Typical Causes

  • Poor posture
  • Disc degeneration
  • Muscle strain
  • Sedentary lifestyle

Our Treatment

Manual therapy, spinal mobilization, core stabilization, posture correction

Recovery Timeline

4–8 weeks

Book Consult
🔄
Cervical spine & postural disorders

Neck Pain

Common Symptoms

  • Stiffness & limited rotation
  • Headaches from neck
  • Arm referred pain
  • Pins & needles in hands

Typical Causes

  • Prolonged screen use
  • Poor ergonomics
  • Disc degeneration
  • Whiplash

Our Treatment

Cervical mobilization, traction, deep neck flexor training

Recovery Timeline

3–6 weeks

Book Consult
⚡
Sciatic nerve pain down the leg

Sciatica

Common Symptoms

  • Sharp burning leg pain
  • Numbness in leg/foot
  • Pain worse sitting
  • Leg weakness

Typical Causes

  • Herniated disc
  • Piriformis syndrome
  • Spinal stenosis
  • Spondylolisthesis

Our Treatment

Neural mobilization, McKenzie exercises, traction, core stability

Recovery Timeline

6–12 weeks

Book Consult
🤲
Adhesive capsulitis & stiffness

Frozen Shoulder

Common Symptoms

  • Progressive stiffness
  • Night pain
  • Inability to raise arm
  • Difficulty with tasks

Typical Causes

  • Shoulder immobilization
  • Diabetes
  • Post-injury
  • Idiopathic

Our Treatment

Glenohumeral mobilization, stretching, pendulum exercises, electrotherapy

Recovery Timeline

3–6 months

Book Consult
🦵
Joint pain & knee dysfunction

Knee Pain

Common Symptoms

  • Pain during weight-bearing
  • Swelling around knee
  • Clicking or locking
  • Stair weakness

Typical Causes

  • Osteoarthritis
  • Ligament injuries
  • Patellofemoral syndrome
  • Meniscus tears

Our Treatment

Quadriceps strengthening, joint mobilization, McConnell taping

Recovery Timeline

4–10 weeks

Book Consult
💫
Herniated disc & nerve compression

Slip Disc

Common Symptoms

  • Radiating arm/leg pain
  • Muscle weakness
  • Altered sensation
  • Pain with coughing

Typical Causes

  • Disc degeneration
  • Heavy lifting
  • Repetitive bending
  • Age-related changes

Our Treatment

McKenzie technique, neural mobilization, lumbar stabilization, traction

Recovery Timeline

6–12 weeks

Book Consult
⚽
Athletic trauma & overuse injuries

Sports Injuries

Common Symptoms

  • Acute pain after injury
  • Swelling & bruising
  • Reduced range of motion
  • Instability

Typical Causes

  • Direct trauma
  • Overuse & overtraining
  • Inadequate warm-up
  • Biomechanical imbalances

Our Treatment

RICE protocol, sports taping, rehab exercises, return-to-sport programme

Recovery Timeline

2–16 weeks

Book Consult
🧠
Stroke & neurological recovery

Paralysis Rehab

Common Symptoms

  • Muscle weakness/paralysis
  • Loss of coordination
  • Spasticity
  • Gait difficulty

Typical Causes

  • Stroke
  • Spinal cord injury
  • Brain injury
  • Neurological disease

Our Treatment

Bobath technique, PNF, functional electrical stimulation, gait retraining

Recovery Timeline

Ongoing — gains in 3–6 months

Book Consult
🔩
Joint inflammation & degeneration

Arthritis

Common Symptoms

  • Joint pain & tenderness
  • Morning stiffness
  • Reduced mobility
  • Warmth & swelling

Typical Causes

  • Age-related wear
  • Autoimmune (RA)
  • Previous injuries
  • Obesity

Our Treatment

Hydrotherapy, gentle mobilization, strengthening, activity modification

Recovery Timeline

Long-term management

Book Consult
💪
Soft tissue injuries & sprains

Muscle Strain

Common Symptoms

  • Muscle soreness
  • Swelling & bruising
  • Limited function
  • Weakness

Typical Causes

  • Overstretching
  • Heavy lifting
  • Sudden movement
  • Chronic overuse

Our Treatment

Soft tissue massage, ultrasound therapy, progressive strengthening

Recovery Timeline

1–6 weeks

Book Consult

Don't See Your Condition?

We treat many conditions. Contact us — our physiotherapists will assess and create a personalized plan.
